Featured Case Study
001

When Eyewear Becomes a Ritual: What IOLLA Teaches Us About Experiential Branding

IOLLA sells frames named after Scottish places. Nespresso sells capsules named after cities. Neither is really selling optics or coffee. They're selling a version of yourself.

Read the case study →
Iolla
Nespresso

About Semeion

Semeion is an independent observatory of brands, storytelling and culture. Researching how communication shapes perception.

Through essays, case studies and research, Semeion explores branding, public relations, storytelling, consumer psychology and digital culture—not as separate disciplines, but as different ways of understanding why ideas resonate.

We don't follow the noise. We decode what drives it.
Read more →

  • TrendsSignals worth noticing before they become obvious.
  • Digital ExperiencesHow design influences perception.
